items.title: UPQODE website approval blocking production launch
items.summary: UPQODE needs final approval on website copy changes to push to production. Team is blocked and has a client demo scheduled for tomorrow morning.
items.actionNeeded: Review and approve the website copy changes sent last week or flag any remaining changes.

items.title: Partnership proposal from Hydrate IV Bar
items.summary: Hydrate IV Bar is proposing a partnership for co-branded IV therapy packages in Miami and Houston locations. They have budget allocated and want to schedule a 20-minute call this week.
items.actionNeeded: Respond with availability for Thursday or Friday call to discuss partnership proposal.

items.title: LeadMaker SDR proposal follow-up
items.summary: LeadMaker Sales is following up on their full-time SDR proposal for inbound lead management and appointment setting sent on May 9th.
items.actionNeeded: Review SDR proposal and respond if interested in scheduling a call to review candidates.
